g.text: F2 The calibration artifact: a 97% “active” spike that wasn’t real

g.text: Before Feb 12 an uncorrected tracking offset mapped nearly every pedestrian into the active zone (red, ~95–98% — physically impossible for a sidewalk alcove). After the fix the split is realistic (~1–12% active). Pre-fix values are re-estimated by matched weekday+hour (warm); later values are measured (black).
